item.title: Why video localization belongs in your core workflow
item.description: For many localization teams, video still sits outside the system. Text moves through mature workflows, while audio and video rely on separate vendors, tools, and review processes. The next step…Read more

item.description: David Aaker, widely regarded as the Father of Modern Branding, explains why awareness is no longer the problem, relevance is, and why leaders who reduce brand to performance metrics are…Read more

item.title: Is your content winning customers or just reaching them?
item.description: The assumption that content which reaches customers will also win them is costing global organizations more than most of their dashboards will ever show. Georg Ell, CEO of Phrase; Dr.…Read more

item.title: Localization workflow automation: 10 ways modern teams scale global content
item.description: Discover ten practical localization workflow automations from CMS integration to custom MT training that reduce errors, streamline processes, and help teams scale effortlessly. Learn how automation can revolutionize your localization…Read more

item.title: The leadership gap holding back enterprise AI
item.description: Enterprise AI is advancing fast, but many organizations are failing to translate experimentation into real advantage. Alvarez & Marsal’s Raf Postepski explains why success depends on leadership, strategy, and redesigning…Read more

item.title: Loc360°: What global content leaders are talking about in 2026

item.title: Navigating regulation, compliance, and antitrust in gaming
item.description: Gaming companies that integrate compliance into product design, localization workflows, and go-to-market planning can reduce launch delays, avoid regulatory penalties, and access more markets simultaneously. Rather than treating legal alignment…Read more

item.title: Aarron Spinley: Why customer experience is built on flawed assumptions (and what leaders should do instead).
item.description: Service failure costs businesses over $10 trillion globally, yet most organizations are still relying on shortcuts and surface-level metrics to manage their customers. Aarron Spinley, author of The Customering Method,…Read more

item.title: Why accessibility matters in translation tools: Improving our CAT editor
item.description: Accessibility is shaping the future of translation tools. Learn how WCAG-aligned improvements in the Phrase CAT editor are helping linguists work faster, with greater clarity and fewer barriers.Read more
